title: Conquest: NiftyCarts
description: Conquest Reforged mod compatibility resource pack for NiftyCarts.
body:
[![Project Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iBiOO1X.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rTrmBCww) Resource pack support for [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts) to match the style of the [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) mod.
### Work in progress pack
Currently implemented All wood types for the Supply, Animal, and Hand carts
Items for Supply, Animal, and Hand carts, as well as the Plow



### Huge thanks and credit to Monsterfish for allowing me to use some textures from [Conquest_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/conquest_)
